meta.title: DEF CON 33 - Full Disclosure, Full Color: Story of This Year's BBV Badge - Abhinav Pandagale
meta.description: This talk pulls the curtain on the behind-the-scenes badge-making story of the second official Bug Bounty Village badge. A fascinating and intricate blend of interactive electronics, layered PCB prints, and Matrix-style LED effects, all wrapped around an engaging CTF.
